title: Amtech - Bucket Scoop for Scooping, Digging, and Lifting Various Materials, Home DIY, Rust-Resistant Stainless Steel, Non-Slip and Comfortable Grip (165mm)
features: HOME DIY STAPLE: The bucket scoop helps you effortlessly remove adhesives from buckets and tubs, with a contoured blade for easy scooping and a flat blade for clean scraping of materials into pans. A must-have for any professional and home DIYer.
DURABLE: Designed to withstand heavy-duty use and harsh conditions of any job site. The stainless steel blade is resistant to rust and corrosion for a lasting performance that you can rely on.

VERSATILE: The non-slip grip enhances comfort for complete control. It’s the perfect tool for digging, lifting, and transporting various materials, including soil, gravel, and debris. It’s also ideal for scooping drywall mud, plaster, and mortar.
3 YEAR WARRANTY: We work hard to make sure our tools are reliable for any task. That’s why all our hand tools are backed by a three year product replacement warranty.
DIY KNOW HOW: At Amtech, we want to improve every home and life by making DIY a doddle for every generation and skill level with tools and expertise that you can rely on.
description: Product Description The stainless steel contoured blade is designed for easy scooping, while the flat blade allows for a clean scraping of materials into pans for efficient DIY. The scoop withstands heavy-duty use and harsh conditions of the job site. The blade is resistant to rust and corrosion for a lasting performance that you can rely on. The non-slip grip enhances comfort for complete control, making it perfect for digging, lifting, and transporting various materials, including soil, gravel, and debris. It’s also ideal for scooping drywall mud, plaster, and mortar.
